faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in Ardsley typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points requiring exclusion. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a rat problem in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Ardsley residents. Rat infestations require prompt attention to prevent property damage and health risks, so we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours of your initial contact.

faqs.question: What does your rat extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait station placement, exclusion work to seal access points, removal of dead rodents, sanitization of affected areas, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: Are rat infestations common in Ardsley homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ardsley's older homes, proximity to wooded areas and the Saw Mill River, and seasonal temperature changes make rat activity fairly common. Norway rats and roof rats seek shelter in attics, basements, and crawl spaces, particularly in fall and winter. Regular inspections and preventative measures can help protect your Ardsley property year-round.
